0._value: Eileen here! Thanks to Maple Chat, I get to talk to my friends allll day, even when I'm eating! You should get some friends and chat it up, just like me!

1._value: Eileen here! I love how fashionable everybody is here. I plan on giving all of my Likability points to the person with the fanciest outfit.

2._value: Eileen here! Did you know that you can chat with your friends while you hunt?

3._value: Eileen here! My friend told me there was a Pink Mushroom around Leafre! I must have it.

4._value: Eileen here! I started eating tomatoes for breakfast. Is that weird? I don't even care, because I love them.

5._value: Eileen here! Have you ever seen a Yeti couple? They're so fluffy, it makes me want to explode!

6._value: Eileen here! I can't even begin to tell you how great this new job is. I haven't had to pick fish guts out of my hair for a week now!

7._value: Eileen here! When I was little, my grandpa said the gods shook a mouse and made Maple World. Now that I'm older, I think my grandpa may have been crazy.

8._value: Eileen here! Don't be surprised if you see me on the big screen one day. I've got everything a gal needs: a great smile, a sweet temper, and a good sense of humor.

9._value: Eileen here! Don't be surprised if you see me on the big screen one day. I've got everything a gal needs: a great smile, a sweet temper, and a good sense of humor.

10._value: Eileen here! How come this Black Mage guy gets to expand his influence all over Maple World? Maybe I should do that...
